series_metadata.series_description: Documents that each new employee (citizen or non-citizen) hired after November 6, 1986 is authorized to work in the United States. (Federal Immigration and Reform Control Act)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until converted to machine readable, or for either three (3) years or for one year after separation, then redact. ; Electronic: Retain for either three (3) years or for one year after separation, then redact., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
